inputs.titre: Première loi sur la ségrégation raciale (Afrique du Sud)

reason: The image depicts a man in period-appropriate attire (fedora, trench coat, suit) walking down a cobblestone street in what appears to be a city. The architecture style is plausible for the early 20th century. However, the buildings in the background seem slightly taller and more modern than what would typically be seen in Johannesburg in 1911. The image also displays tall skyscrapers which aren't that common in 1911 South Africa.
